meta.title: Trampoline & Tumbling Club Management Software in the US | Zaltyko - USAG T&T
meta.description: Manage your USAG Trampoline & Tumbling club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, Trampoline, Tumbling, DMT, synchronized routines and USAG membership.

hero.headline: Manage your USAG Trampoline & Tumbling club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over Trampoline, Tumbling, Double Mini-Tramp and Synchronized athletes. D-scores, routine tracking and USAG membership management.

painPoints.generic: Managing Trampoline, Tumbling, DMT and Synchronized athletes is complex. Each discipline has different scoring and level requirements.
painPoints.specific: Tracking routine difficulty scores (D-scores), coordinating synchronized pairs, managing athletes competing in multiple T&T disciplines, and handling USAG membership renewals.
